notes: Tried nouveau drivers and official NVIDIA v 390.77 and neither made it to the title screen. Upgrading to driver version 396.54 got it working though. The game crashes after choosing the "Exit Game" command from the title screen, but it doesn't seem to be detrimental in any way to the gameplay or basic functionality. Save games were still fine on the next boot up and everything works well. Played fine with a wired Xbox 360 controller.
title: Yonder: The Cloud Catcher Chronicles

notes: With default settings (high) on 2560x1080, I get around 90fps. Pretty great!
title: Yonder: The Cloud Catcher Chronicles

notes:
No controller support out of the box, you need to go into Settings > Controller > General controller settings and untick all the boxes aside from "Guide Button focuses steam".

Found this comment on reddit which helped me with this https://old.reddit.com/r/linux_gaming/comments/azga63/why_do_some_game_controllers_only_work_in_some/ei88pqn/
title: Yonder: The Cloud Catcher Chronicles

notes: Все стабильно работает. Игра играется комфортно и плавно.
title: Yonder: The Cloud Catcher Chronicles
